title: Baccaurea pubera
taxonomy: Baccaurea pubera is a species of tree in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. Baccaurea pubera is classified as a member of the order Malpighiales. This tree species is also known by its synonym, Baccaurea glauca. The classification of Baccaurea pubera is based on its characteristics and relationships to other plant species.

intro: Baccaurea pubera, also known as the Malayan plum tree, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae.
